item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak setuju dengan pandangan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat selalu mendahului hak individu.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that societal interests are often prioritized in Indonesia, then shifts by turn 3 into a rights-protection critique and holds that critique through turn 5. Agent B starts with a balance/autonomy frame and later concedes stronger implementation and enforcement concerns about individual rights.
